data.content: Plan: (1) isolate implementation in a dedicated worktree from current main and bootstrap dependencies with bun install --frozen-lockfile; (2) update the shared session runtime so OpenCode HTTP post-idle output does not re-arm turn liveness and cleanup reaping cannot overwrite exitReason=turn_ended; (3) preserve pre-idle watchdog behavior for stdio/jsonrpc/acp and for active OpenCode turns; (4) add focused regression coverage proving session_idle freezes the completed turn, post-idle stderr/normalized events do not convert it to timeout, and active-turn silence still times out; (5) run bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build before integrating to main. Complexity: small-to-medium, localized runtime/watchdog change with high regression risk because watchdog behavior is shared. Risk: avoid weakening true active-turn timeout detection; keep change gated to completed OpenCode HTTP turns or cleanup phase.
